Class PasswordHashRecordsHistoryTBL

java.lang.Object
com.jamii.jUser.model.PasswordHashRecordsHistoryTBL
@Entity public class PasswordHashRecordsHistoryTBL extends Object
JPA Entity representing password hash history records in the database.

This class maps to the Password_Hash_Records_History table and stores historical snapshots of password hashes for archival purposes.

Key fields:

  • id - Primary key
  • passwordhashrecordsid - Reference to the password hash record
  • passwordsalt - Hashed password value from history
  • dateadded - When this password was added
